hero.title: Run a creator workspace that feels like a real product.
hero.description: Centralize profiles, discovery, saved talent, and internal operations in one control room.
hero.feature1Description: Search, review, and save creator profiles quickly.
hero.feature2Description: Keep profile edits and admin actions inside the same workspace.

login.title: Sign in to your workspace
login.description: Use your account to access profiles, favorites, and admin operations.

register.title: Create your account
register.description: Set up the first creator workspace account and enter the app right away.

navigation.brandDescription: Operations, discovery, and profile management in one workspace.

home.title: Creator workspace overview
home.description: A focused control room for profile management, discovery, shortlist review, and internal ops.
home.heroTitle: Everything important is one click away.
home.heroDescription: Use the sidebar to move between profile setup, discovery, favorites, and admin review without leaving the workspace.

cards.profileOpsDescription: Keep display name, handle, bio, and avatar presentation-ready.
cards.discoveryDescription: Search the directory and turn promising profiles into favorites quickly.
cards.platformDescription: The UI is standardized for desktop and mobile use.

profile.title: Shape the creator profile
profile.description: Manage the public information shown across discovery and favorites.
profile.emptyBio: Add a short creator bio to improve discovery and profile clarity.

discovery.title: Find creator profiles
discovery.description: Search the directory by display name, username, or bio and turn strong matches into favorites.
discovery.searchDescription: Type a name, username, or term from the bio.
discovery.emptyDescription: Try a broader term or clear the search to browse the full directory.

favorites.title: Saved creator shortlist
favorites.description: Keep the strongest creator picks close and remove them when priorities change.
favorites.emptyDescription: Save profiles from discovery to build a shortlist for later review.

admin.title: User operations
admin.description: Review account access and toggle status without leaving the workspace.
admin.emptyDescription: New accounts will appear here for administrative review.
admin.tableDescription: Manage activation status for each account in the platform.

profileCard.emptyBio: Creator profile without a bio yet.

access.denied: Restricted access. You were redirected to the home page.
